channel.title: Da Nang Language Exchange Club
channel.description: Recent content on Da Nang Language Exchange Club

item.title: Storytelling Prompt Ladder
item.description: A set of prompts that move learners from simple descriptions to fuller personal stories and opinions.

item.title: First Meetup Prep Pack
item.description: A quick-start pack covering self-introductions, cafe basics, and fallback questions for your first club night.

item.title: Coffee and Introductions Night
item.description: A beginner-friendly session focused on introductions, routines, and hometown stories, with a particularly strong mix of first-time attendees.

item.title: Work and Study
item.description: A structured worksheet about jobs, study habits, routines, and the kind of life people are building in Da Nang.

item.title: Travel and Places
item.description: A discussion pack about favorite places, travel memories, local recommendations, and how tourism changes a city.

item.title: Food and Dining
item.description: A cafe-friendly worksheet about favorite dishes, local recommendations, and how food habits reflect culture.

item.title: Icebreaker Question Cards
item.description: Low-pressure starter questions for hosts and shy members who need the first five minutes to feel easier.

item.title: Common Cafe Vocabulary
item.description: Useful Vietnamese and English phrases for ordering drinks, asking for seats, and handling simple cafe moments.

item.title: Basic Vietnamese Greetings
item.description: A one-screen starter for greetings, introductions, and polite first questions.

item.title: Da Nang Street Food Session
item.description: A lively but still structured cafe session centered on Da Nang food culture, recommendation sharing, and practical ordering vocabulary.

item.title: About
item.description: Why the club exists, how Friday sessions run, and what makes this Da Nang language exchange different from a generic meetup.

item.title: Contact
item.description: The fastest way to reach the organizers, suggest a venue, or ask about the next Da Nang language exchange session.

item.title: Gallery
item.description: Atmosphere notes and social proof that show what Da Nang Language Exchange sessions actually feel like.

item.title: Join Us
item.description: Join the official Zalo or WhatsApp group, see the Friday cafe details, and get ready for your first Da Nang language exchange session.
